title: Thornmere
description: A Vanilla+ modpack that enhances the core Minecraft experience while staying true to its vanilla roots.
body:
## Vanilla+ : Relive the 2nd Industrial Revolution

Step into a Vanilla+ experience inspired by the 2nd Industrial Revolution, with a strong focus on realism and immersion. This modpack enhances Minecraft while maintaining its core essence. Here’s what awaits you:

****Smooth Performance:**** Handpicked optimization mods ensure smooth gameplay, even on lower-end systems.

****Dynamic Seasons:**** Watch the world change with ****Serene Seasons,**** as you experience the shift in biomes and weather throughout the year.

****Industrial Revolution Awaits:**** Experience the machinery and innovation of the 2nd Industrial Revolution with ****Create****, bringing an industrial feel to your world.

****Immersive World Generation:****
Explore breathtaking landscapes across every dimension:

****Overworld:**** Enhanced by ****Tectonic**** and ****Terralith****, with terrain and biomes more diverse and realistic than ever.

****Nether:**** Vast and more intimidating with ****Amplified Nether,**** offering a fresh challenge in this fiery dimension.

****The End:**** Completely overhauled with ****Nullscape,**** giving the End a much grander, more dangerous feel for your endgame adventures.

****New Structures & Exploration:**** Discover exciting new buildings with ****YUNG's mods,**** adding many new layers to exploration.

****Revamped Progression:**** The journey through the game is reimagined with ****End Remastered,**** changing how you approach and explore the endgame.

****Expanded Decoration:**** Bring your builds to life with an array of new decorative items from ****Handcrafted****, allowing you to customize like never before.

## 
__The modpack is currently in Beta and nearing release, with some features still in development and refinement. Keep an eye out for exciting updates!__

**Report Bugs & Suggestions:** If you encounter any bugs or have suggestions for new features, please let me know on my [Github issues page](https://github.com/cobaltlol2/True-Vanilla-Plus/issues). Your feedback helps me make the modpack even better!
